AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.title: Bottled Code
AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.description:
Upon pickup, choose an Attack or Skill without [gold]Exhaust[/gold] or [gold]Encode[/gold].
Enchant it with [purple]Encoding[/purple].
AUTOMATON-BOTTLED_CODE.flavor: Actually, I have code for that exact thing...
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_CORE.title: Bronze Core
AUTOMATON-BRONZE_CORE.description: Start each combat with an [gold]Encoded[/gold] [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold].
AUTOMATON-CABLE_SPOOL.title: Cable Spool
AUTOMATON-CABLE_SPOOL.description: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] the first [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] unupgraded [gold]Encode[/gold] cards you draw each combat.
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.title: Donu's Washers
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.description: At the start of combat, gain @AuE @AuE and add 1 {{C|Void}} into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AUTOMATON-DONUS_WASHERS.flavor: It is rather clear why Donu collects these.
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.title: Electromagnetic Coil
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.descripti: Functions are now made up of [blue]4[/blue] cards.
AUTOMATON-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.flavor: An inefficient but entertaining power source.
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.title: Frost Primer
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.description: Enchant all Functions you create with [purple]Steady[/purple].
AUTOMATON-FROST_PRIMER.flavor: 22 ounces of the chemical compound Ar22, shelf life: 22 years. Best stored in a mahogany fridge.
AUTOMATON-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.title: Makeshift Battery
AUTOMATON-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.description: Gain @AuE and add a {{C|Slimed}} into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] at the start of your turn.
AUTOMATON-MALLET.title: Mallet
AUTOMATON-MALLET.description: Whenever you [gold]Stash[/gold] a card, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.
AUTOMATON-MALLET.flavor: That's it! I'm gettin me mallet!
AUTOMATON-PLATINUM_CORE.title: Platinum Core
AUTOMATON-PLATINUM_CORE.description:
Start each combat with an [gold]Encoded[/gold] [gold]Strike[/gold] and [gold]Defend[/gold].
At the start if your turn, add a random card with [gold]Encode[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AUTOMATON-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.title: Protective Goggles
AUTOMATON-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.description: If you end your turn with no [gold]Encoded[/gold] cards, gain [blue]{Block:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
AUTOMATON-SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
AUTOMATON-SILVER_BULLET.description: Whenever you create a Status, deal [blue]{Damage:diff()}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
